About Us

Building Tanzania Since 2008

A legacy of excellence in drilling, construction, and water infrastructure development.

About SEBA

Our Story

Seba Drilling and Construction Ltd is a local firm established in 2008. In 2009, we began providing consultancy and services in geophysical, hydrogeological, and geological surveys, drilling and construction of water wells, pump installation and servicing, and design of small water supply schemes.

Today, our company deals with groundwater exploration, irrigation, drilling for sample collecting, diamond drilling, and blasting hole drilling. In 2012, we registered as a Civil and Building Contractor and began our journey in construction works.

Until 2024, we have undertaken water projects, irrigation scheme projects, building construction, dam construction, and numerous road construction projects across Tanzania.

We are dedicated to providing clients with personalized service unmatched in the industry, guaranteeing to meet project demands in a timely, cost-effective manner while upholding our standard of superiority.

Our Mission

To provide good quality and on-time completion of all projects we undertake. To be the preeminent provider of superior construction and drilling services by consistently improving the quality of our projects. To add value for clients through innovation, foresight, integrity, and aggressive performance.

Our Vision

Transforming dreams and imagination into concrete reality. We aim to innovate, inspire, and build a sustainable future for Tanzania. To serve our clients with honor and remain fair and true in dealings with all employees, clients, and partners.

HSE Policy

Health, Safety & Environment

“Safety to us is the most important attributeto all our activities.”

Safety is the most important attribute to all our activities.

We ensure the health, safety, security and work environment of all members including visitors.

We conduct environmental assessments and mitigate all impacts during and post-construction.

We adapt all practical measures to protect and maintain the environment.

We comply with all safety and environmental regulations.

100%
Safety Compliance

Our Equipment

Drilling

Drilling Rig (DTH)

350m max depth — DTH (Down-The-Hole) Method

Drilling

RC Drilling Rig

450m max — Multipurpose RC & Diamond drilling

Drilling

RC Drilling Rig (200m)

200m max — Multipurpose RC & Diamond drilling

Drilling

Diamond Drilling Rig (DD)

800m max depth — Precision core sampling

Drilling

Blast Hole Drilling Rig

40m max depth — DTH Method for mining

Drilling

Mud Rotary Rig

350m max — For loose formation clay and sandy soil

Pumping

Submersible Pump

6" diameter — 100,000 L/hr capacity for pumping tests

Dewatering

Mobile Diesel Water Pump

Centrifugal dewatering pump — Diesel powered

Dewatering

DynaWater Pump

High-capacity dewatering system

Dewatering

Borehole Submersible Dewatering Pump

Deep well dewatering for mining pits

Dewatering

Monoblock Dewatering Pump

Compact dewatering for temporary works

Civil

Excavator

Heavy earthworks and trenching

Civil

Motor Grader

Road leveling and grading

Civil

Steel Drum Roller

Soil and asphalt compaction

Civil

Concrete Mixer

On-site concrete batching

Civil

Backhoe Loader

Versatile earthworks and loading

Survey

ABEM Terrameter SAS 1000

Resistivity measurement for hydrogeological survey

Survey

PQWT S-300

Natural electric field ERT survey — Electrical Resistivity Tomography
